name: Band Hip Abduction
shortDescription: A lateral leg movement with a resistance band to activate and strengthen the hip abductor muscles.
instructions: Place a resistance band around your lower thighs or ankles. Stand tall, shift your weight to one leg, and move the other leg out to the side against the band, then return under control. Repeat for both sides.
steps: Place a resistance band around your thighs or ankles.
Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Lift the other leg laterally against band resistance.
Return leg to start; repeat on both sides.
breathing: Exhale as you lift leg, inhale as you return.
